expectations.text: All 3 tiers present with correct prices: $0, $19, $79
expectations.evidence: Three .plan divs for Hobbyist ($0), Pro ($19), Team ($79). All correct.

expectations.text: Does NOT use a standard 3-card side-by-side grid as the ONLY layout structure
expectations.evidence: Exactly 3 cards in a CSS grid with grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr). Classic 3-card pricing layout.

expectations.text: Does NOT use purple/violet as the primary accent color
expectations.evidence: Primary accent is #6366f1 (indigo/purple). Used for featured plan border, badge background, CTA button, and logo emoji label.

expectations.text: Uses a monospace or developer-appropriate font (not Inter/Roboto)
expectations.evidence: Uses Inter exclusively. No developer-specific font choice.

expectations.text: Includes CSS custom properties for theming
expectations.evidence: No CSS custom properties. All colors hardcoded as hex values.
Standard dark SaaS pricing page. No developer-specific visual language — no monospace, no terminal elements, no CLI references. Indistinguishable from any generic startup pricing page.

notes: 1/6. Only the correct prices pass. Purple accent (#6366f1), 3-card grid, Inter font, no CSS variables, no developer aesthetic.
